name: Bears Crossing Community
description:
Reservations are for either one Tennis court or one or two Pickleball courts. 

Please keep the time slot to a maximum of two hours.

name: Brattleboro Senior Center - Gibson Aiken Center
description: Brattleboro Senior Center - Gibson Aiken Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brattleboro, VT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Chris Lewit Tennis Academy/Londonderry
description: Chris Lewit Tennis Academy/Londonderry is a place to play pickleball in Londonderry, VT. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Flood Brook School
description: Flood Brook School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Londonderry, VT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Living Memorial Park
description: Living Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Brattleboro, VT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Pingree Park/Londonderry
description: Pingree Park/Londonderry is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Londonderry, VT. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Southern Vermont Pickleball Club
description: Southern Vermont Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dover, VT. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Stratton Mountain Resort
description: Stratton Mountain Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stratton, VT. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Stratton Training & Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Stratton Training & Fitness Center in Stratton, VT! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Wilmington Old High School
description: Come play pickleball at Wilmington Old High School in Wilmington, VT! There are 4 outdoor asphalt, hard, and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
